scenarios.name: Shift Start Briefing — Normal Queue
utterances: What do I have on my plate today?
scenarios.setup: 5 open tasks: 2 high priority (aged >24h), 1 medium (aged 12h), 2 medium (aged 4h)
scenarios.expectedResponse: Summary: 5 open exceptions — 2 high priority, 2 aged >24h. Top items: [TASK-001 DHL urgent penalty risk], [TASK-002 Kuehne+Nagel missing packing list]
scenarios.passCriteria: Returns correct task counts, highlights aged/high-priority items, lists top 5

scenarios.name: Shift Start Briefing — Clean Queue
scenarios.expectedResponse: Good news — no open exceptions right now. All tasks resolved. 🟢
scenarios.passCriteria: Correctly identifies empty queue, positive tone

scenarios.name: Task Lookup by Booking ID
scenarios.setup: TASK-003 exists with booking reference BKG-2024-00341 in description
scenarios.expectedResponse: Found 1 task for BKG-2024-00341: [TASK-003] Geodis — Clarification: Vessel substitution on SCL→MIA leg. Created 6 hours ago. Medium priority.
scenarios.passCriteria: Finds correct task, returns booking ID, forwarder, description, age

scenarios.name: Task Lookup by Forwarder
utterances: Show me all tasks from DHL
scenarios.setup: 2 DHL tasks open, 1 Kuehne+Nagel task open
scenarios.expectedResponse: 2 open tasks from DHL Freight: [TASK-001] Missing shipper address — High — 26h old. [TASK-004] HS code correction — Medium — 3h old.
scenarios.passCriteria: Filters by forwarder name, returns all matching tasks with priority and age

scenarios.name: Mark Task Complete
scenarios.expectedResponse: ✅ TASK-003 marked complete. Booking BKG-2024-00341 exception resolved.
scenarios.passCriteria: Confirms task ID before marking done, confirms closure, no double-close errors

scenarios.name: High Priority Exception Filter
utterances: Show me all high priority exceptions
scenarios.expectedResponse: 2 high priority exceptions: [TASK-001] DHL — Penalty risk on BKG-2024-00339 — 26h aged. [TASK-002] Panalpina — Missed cutoff documentation — 18h aged.
scenarios.passCriteria: Returns only High priority tasks, sorted by age descending

scenarios.name: Aged Exceptions Filter
utterances: Show me tasks older than a day
scenarios.setup: TASK-001 is 26h old, TASK-002 is 50h old (escalation needed)
scenarios.expectedResponse: 2 exceptions aged >24h: [TASK-002] 50h — ⚠️ ESCALATION THRESHOLD BREACHED — Panalpina. [TASK-001] 26h — DHL urgent penalty.
scenarios.passCriteria: Correctly identifies aged tasks, flags 48h+ as escalation breach

scenarios.name: Email Auto-Triage (Agent Flow Test)
scenarios.setup: Demo email arrives in admin@ mailbox: Subject: 'RE: Booking BKG-2024-00341 — Missing packing list' Body: 'Hi, please provide the packing list for the above shipment before the cutoff.'
scenarios.expectedResponse: Planner task created: Title='Kuehne+Nagel — Missing packing list [BKG-2024-00341]', Bucket='Missing Info', Priority=Medium, Due=+24h
scenarios.passCriteria: Task created with correct bucket, extracts booking ID, sets 24h due date

scenarios.name: Help / Onboarding
scenarios.expectedResponse: FreightBot helps you manage freight booking exceptions. I can: give you a shift briefing, look up tasks by booking or forwarder, mark tasks complete, and show filtered exception views.
scenarios.passCriteria: Lists all 5 capabilities clearly, suggests a starter action

scenarios.name: Out of Scope Graceful Deflection
utterances: Send an email to DHL for me
What's the ETD for vessel Maersk Sentosa?
scenarios.expectedResponse: I can't do that in Phase 1 — I handle exception task management in Planner. For SAP updates or sending emails, use your standard tools. Is there an exception task I can help with?
scenarios.passCriteria: Gracefully declines out-of-scope requests, redirects to in-scope capabilities
